title: Crunchy Herbal Chive Crumble
description: A low-fat-friendly brunch dish featuring roasted chives in a crunchy texture, perfect for adding some herbal flair to your meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup chopped fresh chive
ingredients.notes: Chop finely to enhance flavor and texture.

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the chopped chive with olive oil and salt and pepper. Mix well until evenly coated.
Spread the mixture on a lined baking sheet, ensuring even coverage and a thin layer for better crispiness after roasting.
Place in preheated oven and roast for about 20-25 minutes or until crispy but not burnt.
Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before adding sour cream and grated Parmesan cheese. Mix gently to combine ingredients.
Serve the chive crumble warm on toast, bagels, or as a side dish with eggs or pancakes.
